title: phalaris minor var. nepalensis
intro: Phalaris minor var. nepalensis, also known as Nepalese lesser timothy grass, is a type of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phalaris minor var. nepalensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit potential anticancer properties. It can be prepared into herbal tea, powder, or extract, making it a versatile and accessible remedy in traditional medicine.
